steps.title: Narrow the aim
steps.content: The first sentence gives the researchers' general aim: analyze cattle diet composition. The second sentence narrows that aim to the ratio of three plant subtypes in the animals' diet.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals replacement or contrast, but the second sentence refines the first. Choice B signals concession, with no concession present. Choice C signals a result, but the second sentence is a specific version of the same aim. The answer is D.
